text:
Created attachment 253942
www/py-video-downloader

video-downloader by Unrud allows users to download videos from various
websites, including YouTube, with a simple interface. Key features
include the ability to convert videos to MP3, support for
password-protected content, and downloading entire playlists.
It automatically selects video formats based on user-defined
quality preferences and is built on the yt-dlp framework.

https://github.com/Unrud/video-downloader
